message:
refactor(extensions): move UI hostcall helpers from dispatcher to extensions module

Relocate classify_ui_hostcall_error() and ui_response_value_for_op() from
extension_dispatcher.rs to extensions.rs where they logically belong alongside
the other host call types and error classification infrastructure.

This reduces coupling in the dispatcher module and makes these helpers
available to other consumers (e.g., tests, alternative dispatchers) without
pulling in the full dispatcher dependency chain. The dispatcher now imports
them from the extensions module.

- classify_ui_hostcall_error: maps Error messages to timeout/denied/code
  categories for structured host call error responses
- ui_response_value_for_op: extracts response values from ExtensionUiResponse
  with deterministic defaults for cancelled operations (confirm → false)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
